name: Macaroni Meal-in-a-Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the boiling water to a simmer.
2. Add macaroni and cook until al dente.
3. Drain the macaroni.
4. In a separate pan, melt butter or margarine over medium heat.
5. Stir in flour, pepper, mustard, milk, peas, ham (if using), cheese, olives, and onion.
6. Combine all ingredients with cooked macaroni.
7. Transfer mixture to a baking dish.
8. Bake until bubbly and golden brown.
9. Turn off the oven.
10. Let cool slightly before serving.
